steps.title: Compare the two paths
steps.content: The passage describes Ifemelu and Obinze taking different routes after high school: she goes to the United States for university, and he goes to London hoping to start a career.

steps.title: Choose the parallel transition
steps.content: The transition needs to show a simultaneous, separate path. Nevertheless would signal contrast, Secondly would make a sequence, and In fact would add emphasis rather than parallel action. The answer is A.
